items.title: NEW PORTICO OVER EXISTING FRONT LANDING 4/9/26: Framing Cert submitted and Denied / What is the "Intent" of the approved plans??? Framing was either done in accordance with approved plans or it wasn't. Framing Cert must state that it was inspected and the "Framing was done in accordance with the approved plans and the NYS Residential Code" / Joe O'B
